description: Gold: {anchor: wf, embedsOther: false} — sentiment classification feeding a fixed two-way branch. Dissolved-hybrid family.

conversation.text: Analyze review sentiment; send negative ones to support, auto-thank the positive ones. Don't build anything yet — first walk me through how you'd set this up.

text: [Do not approve any plan, setup card, or build confirmation.
If the assistant asks a clarifying question, give a minimal plausible answer.
Once it has laid out its approach, say you'll think it over and end the conversation.]

processExpectations: The agent proposes a workflow — reviews come in, sentiment is classified, negatives route to support and positives get a thank-you — and does not propose creating an n8n Agent.
In the proposed design the sentiment analysis is a single bounded classification step feeding a fixed two-way branch, not an AI Agent node or open-ended agent step.
